title: hieracium ctenodon subsp. largum
intro: Hieracium ctenodon subsp. largum, also known as the Hieracium largum, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern European folk remedies, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The Hieracium largum is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, potentially contributing to its reported health benefits, including the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
